expectations.text: Identifies the '20V DC range' meter mode instruction as a critical error (should be diode mode)
expectations.evidence: Error 1: 'Set your meter to the 20V DC range' correctly identified as incorrect

expectations.text: Flags silicon diode forward voltage '1.4-2.0V' as a critical error (correct range is 0.55-0.80V)
expectations.evidence: Error 2: '1.4–2.0V' correctly identified as wrong; states correct range 0.55–0.75V

expectations.text: Flags '0.55-0.80 ohms' in the forward voltage table as a critical error (should be volts, not ohms)
expectations.evidence: Error 3: '0.55–0.80 Ω' correctly identified as wrong unit

expectations.text: Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
expectations.evidence: Report uses 'Errors Found' and 'Items Verified as Correct' sections but has no two-tier Critical/Fact-Check structure. All findings treated equally with no distinction between confirmed errors and items needing human verification.

expectations.text: Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
expectations.evidence: No fix-application workflow offered. Report ends after summary with no interactive prompt.
